message: Hello! I'm your BPMN Modeling Agent. I'll analyze the task now and start planning the diagram.
I've analyzed the task and defined 8 goals for the model.
Setting up the participant structure first (pools and lanes) so each responsibility is clearly owned before modeling the process flow.

I’ll now model the end-to-end return process across the existing pools, using message flows between Portal↔Customer, Portal↔Warehouse, Warehouse↔Accounting, and Accounting↔Customer. I’ll include an event-based wait for either arrival or 14-day timeout, and distinct no-refund vs refund endings.
I've reviewed the completed model. Found 6 issue(s) — details below.
⚠️ 2 critical issue(s) detected. Automatically starting correction pass 1/3…

I’ll fix the Portal’s incorrect use of an EndEvent as a mid-process message sender by replacing it with a Message Intermediate Throw Event and adding a proper arrival-branch EndEvent, then reconnect the message flow accordingly.
I've reviewed the completed model. Found 7 issue(s) — details below.
⚠️ 3 critical issue(s) detected. Automatically starting correction pass 2/3…
Fixing the Portal mid-process message send (replace EndEvent), and adding the missing message flow into the arrival catch event.
I've reviewed the completed model. Found 8 issue(s) — details below.
⚠️ 5 critical issue(s) detected. Automatically starting correction pass 3/3…

I’ll correct the Portal’s mid-process EndEvent issue by turning the label-sending point into a proper message throw event (so the process can continue), then complete the arrival branch after the event-based wait, and fix the malformed parent metadata for EndClosedNoRefund.

Applying fixes in the Portal pool: replace the mid-process EndEvent used for sending the label with a proper message throw event, reconnect the message flow, ensure the arrival branch continues to an end state, and correct the malformed parent metadata on EndClosedNoRefund.

I’ll fix the Portal arrival branch so the token doesn’t get stuck: add an outgoing sequence flow from CatchArrivedMsg to the Portal’s Arrived end event (EndArrived). This completes the EventBasedGateway branch and resolves the dead-end.
I've reviewed the completed model. Found 5 issue(s) — details below.
⚠️ After 3 correction attempt(s), 3 critical issue(s) remain. Please review manually.
